Assets.ReleaseNotes:
Version 0.1.51

What changed:
- Model dropdowns can now show compact provider usage hints such as remaining tokens and reset time when PassiFlow receives rate-limit headers.
- Dictation is less likely to stay stuck in Transcribing because post-processing requests now use bounded timeouts and safer UI/history dispatch.
- Temporary transcript clipboard writes are excluded from Windows clipboard history and cloud sync when possible.
- Clipboard paste restore timing was tuned for browser, Electron, and terminal targets, reducing post-dictation delay while keeping insertion reliable.
- Run Log retry/status handling is more reliable after retrying failed transcriptions.

Version 0.1.50

What changed:
- Bound PassiFlow transcribing stalls.
- Suppress temporary clipboard history.
- Delay clipboard restore after paste.
- Stabilize PassiFlow paste and release validation.
- Always-visible retry button with in-place update.
- End recording mute double-call, AutoCheckUpdates reset, post-processing crash.

- Add provider limit traffic light.

Version 0.1.46

What changed:
- Failed transcriptions now keep the recorded audio in the run log, so you can retry instead of losing the recording.

Version 0.1.42

What changed:
- fix: compact update page and accurate update badge

Version 0.1.41

What changed:
- fix: polish update page layout and notifications
- fix: remove rejected prompt preset QoL buttons
- feat: add safe settings and update QoL polish
- fix: format pipeline timing invariantly
- perf: smooth run log and add pipeline timing
- fix: keep changelog out of update version dropdown
- fix: include recent commits in update notes
- fix: generate readable update changelog notes

Install this version to get these fixes and improvements. PassiFlow restarts after the update.
